input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.1.9.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.1.9.1
            TITLE: tractive system firewalls must meet the requirements of t.1.8 above

            CONTENT:
            rule T.1.9.1: Tractive System Firewalls must meet the requirements of T.1.8 above
T.1.9.1 Tractive System Firewalls must meet the requirements of T.1.8 above

final_answer: Tractive System Firewalls must meet the requirements of T.1.8 above
